column11: Hi I just joined the free trial and would like to find out more about the IVR forwarding function but it seems the free trial doesn't support such set up, my requirement is the following, a customer calls a mobile number (may be it's a mobile purchased from Cinnox) and then they will be asked to provide a response, for example, press 1 for Shop A, press 2 for Shop B, press 3 for Shop C. if customer presses 1, it would then call Shop A phone number. Does Cinnox support such function? You can reply in Chinese, I can read
I understand your requirement. To use IVR, you will need a virtual number and the subscription needs to be upgraded. Let me have a sales representative to help you with this
or is it convenient for you to contact you via phone or email?
I can be contacted via phone, what language do they speak?
my colleaguge speaks Cantonese and Mandarin.
cantonese is fine, when will they be available to call? I need to find a room to speak in private
oh I see. then please wait a moment, let me see if he is available for a call now
Excuse me, he is away for lunch now. Can you provide your number and email. I will send an email to connect you both, and you can arrange a time for call. what do you think?
that's fine, my email is forti@rocketmail.com my phone is (852)93030532
May I have your name please?
Thanks for your understand and patience
One last thing, if I fail to receive a call, I just come back to this chat bot?
yes, you can contact us here with the same path
ok thank you Sandy. have a nice day
